steps.title: Identify the signal
steps.content: The passage claims “Other animals also find tools helpful.” The underlined sentence comes next as concrete evidence.

steps.title: Match the function
steps.content: The underlined sentence functions as the first specific example supporting this claim, showing one instance of tool use in a nonhuman animal. The others either shift focus to humans, make unsupported comparisons, or invent claims about relative intelligence. That matches choice B — B is correct.
